titles.en: Divine Unity and Justice Beyond Human Imagination

text: ٤٧٠. وَسُئِلَ عَنِ التَّوْحِيدِ وَالْعَدْلِ فَقَالَ (عليه السلام): التَّوْحِيدُ أَلَّا تَتَوَهَّمَهُ وَالْعَدْلُ أَلَّا تَتَّهِمَهُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 470. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, was asked on the Unity of Allāh and His justice, when he replied: Unity means that you do not subject Him to the limitations of your imagination and justice means that you do not lay any blame on Him. [1]
